items.name: Regular Carpet
items.description: You walk past a rug shop, where a clerk tries to sell you a magic carpet.  You tell him you don't want a magic carpet today. He then admits to you that he was lying, and this really is just a regular carpet. His whole life is a lie. Then he starts crying. You kind of have to buy it after that.  This is a regular carpet and it literally does nothing.

items.name: Knights of Redcliff: Bow and Arrow
items.description: The Knights of Redcliff are well known for their talented archers.  Their unique Redcliff arrows are thought to be especially deadly and are crafted in complete secrecy by only one Redcliff family, that hands down the secret to each generation.

items.name: Sir Scaresalot
items.description: A good knight always carries on until the job is done. Equip to spawn this loyal ghost knight by your side. He'll attack at your command.

items.name: Aphmau Cat Shoulder Pet
items.description: Bring home the magic of Aphmau with this shoulder pet! Perfectly cuddly with pink and purple hearts and stars, this shoulder pet is the ULTIMATE addition to your collection! Adopt your own today!

items.name: Knights of Redcliff: Deluxe Sword and Shield Set
items.description: Don't let this simple, elegant blade fool you.  This is the most deadly Redcliff sword yet!

items.name: Potion of the Fiery Fists
items.description: This magical elixir lets you run quickly to catch up with your opponent. Once you've got him - it's on!

items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Lightning Staff
items.description: Cast orbs that shoot lightning at your enemies when they get too close! Enemies hit are dealt 20 damage each.

items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Ballista
items.description: While their capability to melee combat their opponents is only rivaled by the RedCliff Knights, the Knights of the Splintered Skies also make use of some heavy artillery. The ballista, a strong long range powerful artillery, is capable of shooting bolts at ridiculous speed and power, and destroying multiple targets at once. With its hidden ability to fire lit bolts that do constant light damage, the ballista is a powerful weapon indeed.
